description: Walking between buildings on the Front Range Community College - Larimer campus, I heard this bird before I saw it. In my initial notes that I made regarding the song, I only noted that the bird's song was more hoarse/deeper than that of a House Find. In regard to the call, I noted that as the bird flew away it was giving a call that I could best describe as a deep "chip" similar to a Red-winged Blackbird. When I saw the bird before it flew, my observations were as follows. It was roughly the size of a House Finch. It had red down its chest, around and over the top of its head, and all the way down its back to its tail. I could not make out any distinct, crisp, brown streaking in the red on its sides. Also, there was no streaking on its white undertail. That is all that I wrote down at the time.
